title: Toggle lists & headings
excerpt: Similar to Notion, the ability to toggle/collapse lists and headings in Monday Docs.

posts.author: colincsimmons (Colin Simmons)
posts.cookedHtml: Similar to Notion, the ability to toggle/collapse lists and headings in Monday Docs.

posts.author: CristinaMacavei (Cristina M)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes please, it’s a major bummer it’s not available already.

posts.author: erinatleap (Erin Pittman)
posts.cookedHtml: This would be SO helpful for keeping running docs going & save a ton of time.

posts.author: jkhafemann (Jonathan Hafemann)
posts.cookedHtml: this would help get us out of Notion, toggles are a big feature for content organization. Please add!
